response:
The Legal and Engineering teams completed an open source license audit, scanning 234 total OSS dependencies and uncovering two issues: a charting library using the AGPL viral license incompatible with the company’s SaaS model, and a second package with no assigned license.
The teams recommend removing both problematic packages ahead of the next official release, and suggest switching the AGPL-licensed charting library to Apache-licensed Chart.js as a compatible alternative.
